LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- PLAINTIFF DAVID B. FECHHEIMER'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT -- GRANTED ON THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: 1. DISCOVERY REOPENED UNTIL THE FRIDAY BEFORE THE TRIAL. 2. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT THE RATE OF $150/0.5 HR. FOR DEPOSITION TAKING. 3. IF DEFENDANT MAKES A MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL BASED ON THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF MAY NOT HAVE OBJECTIONS. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER. AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TO BE FILED ON THE FILING OF THE ORDER. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David M. Zeff, Esq., 923-1380, for plaintiff David B. Fechheimer and moving party
Hugo Torbet, Esq., 673-5271, for defendant and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF DAVID B. FECHHEIMER's MOTION For Leave To File First Amended Complaint -- GRANTED on the following conditions: 1. Discovery reopened until the Friday before the trial. 2. Plaintiff to pay defendant the rate of $150/0.5 hr. for deposition taking. 3. If defendant makes a motion to continue trial based on the amended complaint, plaintiff may not have objections. Plaintiff is to prepare and submit an order. Amended complaint is to be filed on the filing of the order. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: ERIC THRONE, CSR 7855
